verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Commandeer demonstrated; Clean release verified; OS normal throughout; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.commandeer_evidence: LifeOS takes real authoritative control: while the port is held the little brother genuinely cannot bind it (EADDRINUSE asserted) — control is real, not advisory.
gate_result.release_evidence: Release restores the prior state (restored:true) and the OS immediately re-binds the port itself.
gate_result.normal_evidence: During the hold the host binds other ports and runs processes normally (I13); the full arc is audited acquire->release with restored:true.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Real EADDRINUSE denial, real restore, real concurrent host operations.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the control plane absent (8/8 files failing) at the lane red commit, green at HEAD

proof_summary: ARCHBP-108 is complete: the end-to-end commandeer-and-release proof holds — LifeOS takes real authoritative control (the host is genuinely denied the resource while held), releases cleanly with verified restoration, and the OS functions normally throughout, with the whole arc audited.
